title: Balloon Ghasts
description: Turns the happy ghast into a hot air balloon, if it has a harness. Tenties removed, ''lightly'' inspired by Actions and Stuff 1.5!
body: Turns the happy ghast into a hot air balloon, if they wear a harness. Tenties removed (sorry i had no other choice), "lightly" inspired by Actions and Stuff 1.5! 16 dyes for 16 mobs, some are tinted.
